Section: Applications And Background-Check Form Sources.

Table summary.
File name: source-materials/applications/background-check-forms/Employee Authorization Form.pdf. Type of document: Background-check authorization form. Purpose: Source for employee authorization process.. Current status: Imported blank form source. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Is this the current approved provider form?.
File name: source-materials/applications/background-check-forms/Summary of Rights FCRA 2018.002.pdf. Type of document: Background-check rights notice. Purpose: Source for required applicant/employee rights notice.. Current status: Imported blank/legal notice source. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Does this need updated provider, legal, or attorney review before use?.
File name: source-materials/applications/background-check-forms/Volunteer Authorization Form.pdf. Type of document: Background-check authorization form. Purpose: Source for volunteer authorization process.. Current status: Imported blank form source. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Is this the current approved provider form?.
File name: source-materials/applications/blank-job-application-forms/KBC_Custodian_Job_Application.docx. Type of document: Blank job application. Purpose: Source for application structure and language.. Current status: Imported blank form source. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Should the Bookkeeper application follow this format exactly or adapt for financial confidentiality?.
File name: source-materials/applications/blank-job-application-forms/KBC_Custodian_Job_Application_Rev_March2026.pdf. Type of document: Blank job application. Purpose: Source PDF version of Custodian application.. Current status: Imported blank form source. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Which Custodian application version is authoritative?.
File name: source-materials/applications/final-approved-blank-forms/KBC_Custodian_Job_Application_Rev_Mar2026.pdf. Type of document: Final approved blank job application. Purpose: Source for approved application format.. Current status: Imported final approved blank form. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Should the Bookkeeper application use this as the official formatting baseline?.

Section: Prior Proposals And Finance Sources.
